Package
Description
org.jscience.social.architecture
Provides mathematical and analytical models for architectural engineering, building physics, and urban history.

  • Uses of FireEscapeAnalyzer.Compartment in org.jscience.social.architecture

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static FireEscapeAnalyzer.EvacuationResult
    FireEscapeAnalyzer.analyzeEvacuation(List<FireEscapeAnalyzer.Compartment> compartments, List<FireEscapeAnalyzer.Exit> exits)
    Calculates the total evacuation time for a set of compartments and exits.
    static Map<String,Boolean>
    FireEscapeAnalyzer.checkTravelDistances(List<FireEscapeAnalyzer.Compartment> compartments, double maxDistance, double maxDeadEnd)
    Verifies that travel distances from any point to the nearest exit stay within code-mandated limits.
    static List<String>
    FireEscapeAnalyzer.signageRequirements(List<FireEscapeAnalyzer.Compartment> compartments, List<FireEscapeAnalyzer.Exit> exits)
    Identifies necessary safety signage and lighting for evacuation routes.
